title: Consumed Stream pipelines should not be reused
description: Once a Java Stream pipeline has been consumed, it cannot be reused. Attempting to reuse a consumed Stream pipeline will result in an IllegalStateException. This rule detects attempts to reuse consumed Stream pipelines, which can lead to runtime errors and unpredictable behavior.
recommendation: Do not attempt to reuse a Stream pipeline after it has been consumed. Always create a new Stream pipeline for each operation.
impact: Reusing a consumed Stream pipeline will throw an IllegalStateException at runtime, potentially causing application failures.

checks.message: Do not attempt to reuse a Stream pipeline after it has been consumed. Always create a new Stream pipeline for each operation.
